title: T-002 — Drizzle migration: wo_material_consumption table + RLS
prompt:
# T-002 — Drizzle migration: wo_material_consumption table + RLS

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.3, §16.4 V-PROD-02/16, §5.1#4 R14

## Goal
Add Drizzle migration creating wo_material_consumption per §9.3 with R14 idempotency (transaction_id UNIQUE), CHECK constraint chk_over_consumption_approval, RLS, and §9.3 indexes.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/wo-material-consumption.ts: PK id UUID, transaction_id UUID UNIQUE NOT NULL (R14), tenant_id, wo_id, component_id, lp_id, qty_consumed NUMERIC(12,3) CHECK >0, operator_id, fefo_adherence_flag bool NOT NULL, fefo_deviation_reason text, over_consumption_flag default false, over_consumption_approved_by/_at/_reason_code, consumed_at default now, ext_jsonb. Add CHECK chk_over_consumption_approval per §9.3. Indexes: idx_consumption_wo, idx_consumption_lp, idx_consumption_fefo_dev (partial WHERE fefo_adherence_flag = false), idx_consumption_operator_time. RLS by tenant_id.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/wo-material-consumption.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_wo_material_consumption.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/wo-material-consumption-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two INSERTs share a transaction_id, when both execute, then second fails with unique_violation (R14)
2. Given over_consumption_flag=true and approved_by NULL, when INSERT runs, then CHECK constraint chk_over_consumption_approval rejects it
3. Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_consumption_fefo_dev exists with partial predicate WHERE fefo_adherence_flag = false

## Test strategy
- RED: write schema test asserting transaction_id UNIQUE + check constraint name before schema exists
- Run pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-material-consumption-schema

## Risk red lines
- Do not weaken qty_consumed > 0 CHECK
- Do not drop CHECK chk_over_consumption_approval
- Do not add foreign keys outside §9.3 (license_plates, work_orders, wo_materials, users only)

pipeline_inputs.description: wo_material_consumption Drizzle table with R14 idempotency, over-consumption CHECK, FEFO partial index, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Mirror §9.3 SQL exactly: 4 indexes including partial idx_consumption_fefo_dev WHERE fefo_adherence_flag=false, CHECK chk_over_consumption_approval (over_consumption_flag = false OR over_consumption_approved_by IS NOT NULL), CHECK qty_consumed > 0, transaction_id UUID UNIQUE for R14 idempotency, RLS policy on tenant_id.
out_of_scope: Do not implement FEFO logic here
acceptance_criteria: Given two INSERTs sharing transaction_id, when both execute, then unique_violation raised
Given over_consumption_flag=true and approved_by NULL, when INSERT runs, then chk_over_consumption_approval rejects
Given migration applied, when pg_indexes queried, then idx_consumption_fefo_dev partial index exists with predicate fefo_adherence_flag=false
test_strategy: RED: schema test asserting transaction_id UNIQUE + chk_over_consumption_approval present, before schema exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-material-consumption-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not drop CHECK chk_over_consumption_approval (R16 risk)
